message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

class UmlReverseApp

class MainController

package "javafx" {
    class Stage
    class Scene
    class BorderPane
    class MenuBar
    class TabPane
    class MenuItem
}

package "diagram" {
    package "visitor" {
        interface IDiagramVisitor {
            + visit(ClassDiagram visitor) : void
            + visit(SequenceDiagram visitor) : void
            + visit(UseCaseDiagram visitor) : void
            + visit(DiagramManager visitor) : void
        }

        class ToViewVisitor {
            + getDiagramMenu() : IDiagramMenu
            + getDiagramEditor() : IDiagramEditor
        }

        IDiagramVisitor <|.. ToViewVisitor
    }

    class TreeFileManagerView

    interface IDiagramMenu

    interface IDiagramEditor
}

UmlReverseApp "1" -- "1" MainController : controller
UmlReverseApp "1" -- "1" Stage : stage
UmlReverseApp ..> IDiagramVisitor

Stage "1" -- "1" Scene : scene

Scene "1" -- "1" BorderPane : borderpane

BorderPane "1" -- "1" MenuBar : north
BorderPane "1" -- "1" TabPane : center
BorderPane "1" o-- "1" TreeFileManagerView : fileManagerView
BorderPane "1" o-- "1" IDiagramMenu : est

MenuBar "1..n" o-- "0..n" MenuItem : items

TabPane "1" -- "0..*" IDiagramEditor : editors

MainController ..> Stage
MainController ..> BorderPane

@enduml
```
